description_long: This is a white low-top sneaker with three black stripes on each side, characteristic of Adidas Superstar shoes. The upper is primarily made of synthetic leather, with a shell toe cap and a flat rubber sole. The heel features a black patch with a white Adidas trefoil logo, while the side displays the word 'SUPERSTAR' in gold. The shoe has white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern and a padded collar for comfort. The overall appearance shows some signs of wear, with minor creasing and dirt visible on the sole and upper. This type of shoe is commonly worn in urban environments for casual or athletic use.
description: A white Adidas Superstar sneaker with black stripes, gold branding, and visible signs of wear. Features a shell toe, flat sole, and standard lacing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the shell toe, white laces, and the three black stripes partially visible on both sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the three black stripes, gold 'SUPERSTAR' text, and the low-top profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the black heel patch with the white Adidas trefoil logo and some wear on the heel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the three black stripes and the clean, simple design of the shoe's side.
attribute_logo: White Adidas trefoil logo on black heel patch at the back of the shoe
